boundary_binding.action_boundary: May procurement execute the controlled-solvent purchase?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Cannot allow - hazard-control status not confirmed
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-AST-081-P requires hazard-control status confirmed before PO execution; REL-AST-081 shows controls pending
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: REL-AST-081 confirms timing/scope/authority match but hazard-control dependency unresolved

final_answer: The controlled-solvent purchase cannot proceed. Source records confirm material, quantity band, facility, and purchase order match between REL-AST-081 and PO-AST-081. However, STD-AST-081-P mandates hazard-control status confirmation before execution, and REL-AST-081 explicitly states active cabinet/handler controls remain pending. The source boundary remains open. This matches the 047-style abstract-field trap pattern where generic approval language substitutes for exact hazard-control evidence.
open_blockers: Active cabinet/handler controls remain pending per REL-AST-081
